summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Sheeshmahal Jewellers website. All 20 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing completed successfully with all pages loading correctly, navigation working, and admin CRUD operations functional.

issues: Text appears very faint/low contrast on the location page - the address, contact, and opening hours text has low visibility against the background

action_items: Consider improving text contrast on Location page for better readability

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all pages load, navigation works, admin CRUD functional)

seed_data_creation: Backend seeds 6 jewellery items and 4 approved reviews on startup if collections are empty
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features tested and working: Home page with hero/categories/featured items/reviews marquee, Gallery with category filters, About page with values, Contact page with review submission form, Location page with Google Maps iframe, Admin login/dashboard with jewellery CRUD and review management. Protected routes redirect unauthenticated users correctly.

public_pages.home: Hero section, category cards, featured jewellery, reviews marquee, CTA buttons - ALL WORKING
public_pages.gallery: Jewellery listing, category filter - ALL WORKING
public_pages.about: Story section, value cards - ALL WORKING
public_pages.contact: Contact info, review submission form with success toast - ALL WORKING
public_pages.location: Google Maps iframe, directions button - ALL WORKING

navigation.navbar: All nav links working (Home, Gallery, About, Contact, Location)
navigation.footer: Why shop reasons, social links, quick links - ALL PRESENT

admin.login: JWT authentication working with correct credentials
admin.dashboard: Jewellery tab with CRUD operations, Reviews tab with approve/reject/delete
